context: Tests whether the agent treats tflint warnings for undeclared variables as non-critical (bad) or treats them seriously by documenting why they matter and fixing all undeclared variable references, while following the complete validation workflow.

checklist.name: tflint run
checklist.description: The validation_report.md documents running tflint (or noting it was skipped with reason)

checklist.name: Missing vars identified
checklist.description: The report identifies the specific undeclared variables: subnet_id, app_name, environment, owner_email, cost_center

checklist.name: Risk explanation
checklist.description: The report explains why undeclared variables are a problem (silently treated as null, masking misconfiguration, runtime errors at apply time)

checklist.name: Variables declared with types
checklist.description: The fixed/variables.tf file declares all missing variables with a `type` attribute

checklist.name: Variables declared with descriptions
checklist.description: The fixed/variables.tf file declares all missing variables with a `description` attribute

checklist.name: All 5 missing vars fixed
checklist.description: fixed/variables.tf includes declarations for all 5 missing variables: subnet_id, app_name, environment, owner_email, cost_center

checklist.name: terraform validate run
checklist.description: The validation_report.md shows terraform validate was run (after init)

checklist.name: terraform fmt run
checklist.description: The validation_report.md shows terraform fmt was run

checklist.name: extract_tf_info_wrapper run
checklist.description: The validation_report.md documents running the extract_tf_info_wrapper.sh script

checklist.name: Warnings not dismissed
checklist.description: The report does NOT characterize the undeclared variable warnings as safe to ignore or non-critical
